_schema: MESSAGE_BOARD v2 — rebuilt 2026-03-11 session 146. Max 20 messages. Prune oldest on overflow.

messages.message: STRIPE TERMINAL POS — ADR COMPLETE. Decisions: WisePOS E/S700 (WiFi) not M2 Bluetooth (iOS Safari incompatible). @stripe/terminal-js SDK, internet discovery mode. Schema: Purchase gets source (ONLINE|POS), nullable userId (walk-in buyers), optional buyerEmail. v1: 1 item per transaction. New controller: terminalController.ts. New routes: /api/stripe/terminal/{connection-token,payment-intent,capture,cancel}. New page: /organizer/pos. Terminal PIs use capture_method:manual + payment_method_types:[card_present]. Existing webhook handler covers success event with minor buyerEmail receipt tweak. ADR: claude_docs/feature-notes/stripe-terminal-pos-adr.md. Ready for dev dispatch.

CAMERA WORKFLOW V2 — ARCHITECTURE DECISIONS SHIPPED. All 7 questions resolved + documented. Status: ready for findasale-dev immediate dispatch. Schema: 4 Item fields (aiConfidence, backgroundRemoved, faceDetected, autoEnhanced) + Photo table forward-look. Backend: analyzeItemImage returns confidence; processRapidDraft stores it; bulk-update handles new flags. Frontend: TensorFlow.js COCO-SSD on-device face detection (100% privacy); Canvas auto-enhance + 4:3 crop before upload (non-blocking); Cloudinary b_remove + ar transforms at display time. Implementation order + full handoff in CAMERA_WORKFLOW_V2_ARCHITECTURE.md (feature-decisions dir). No further decisions needed. Patrick: approve handoff to dev or request changes.

Camera Workflow v2 scope validation COMPLETE. In-scope: rapidfire multi-photo, 4:3 guide, confidence tinting, per-item editor (aspect/brightness/contrast), batch price/category, buyer preview. Deferred: quality warnings, face detection, background removal API (architecture lock required). Zero hard blockers. Architect decisions pending.

Board Meeting #1 complete. Two items approved unanimously: (1) Sessions 142-143 audit — fleet redesign delivered, file hygiene did not. (2) Hard-gated file/folder rules — 5-point plan approved. Implementation in progress this session.
